sentence_reviews.text: LLM-as-judge uses a model to score, compare, critique, or classify outputs under a rubric, often calibrated against human labels and bias checks.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: LLM-as-judge survey covers model-based judging, scoring, comparison, critique, rubrics, human agreement, and judge biases; NIST AI RMF covers measurement, monitoring, risk, and test/evaluation practices; Transformer paper supports transformer architecture as model substrate.
sentence_reviews.notes: The cited sources support the main technical relationship, but the wording combines atlas taxonomy terms rather than a single quoted source claim.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of LLM-as-judge & automated critique is to connect Decoder-only causal transformers, Human evaluation & preference studies to downstream capabilities including Observability, tracing & evaluation harnesses.
